name: Data Register — Configuration Service
summary: Populate a dropdown with dynamic data from the ADSP Configuration Service using a URN register
whenToUse: Dropdown lists whose values are managed by admins and change over time
Province/territory lists, program options, or category lists maintained in ADSP configuration
notes: Set `enum: [""]` as a placeholder in the data schema — the actual values are loaded from the register
The `options.register.urn` points to a Configuration Service configuration definition
Admin-managed lists can be updated without changing the form definition
The register data can be an array of strings or array of `{label, value}` objects
Requires the JsonFormRegisterProvider context wrapper in the React integration
